title: cymbopogon distans
intro: Cymbopogon distans, also known as East Indian lemon grass or barbed wire grass, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae, native to tropical Asia and India. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. The health benefits of Cymbopogon distans include reducing stress and anxiety, improving circulation, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is often used in herbal preparations like essential oils, teas, and infusions, which can be used topically or internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
